headline: ROST Expands With 17 New Locations, Signals 2026 Growth Pipeline
summary: Ross Stores opens 17 new U.S. stores as the first step in its 2026 expansion plan, with about 110 locations planned this year and roughly 5% unit growth targeted.

raw.headline: ROST Expands With 17 New Locations, Signals 2026 Growth Pipeline

headline: WILLIAMS SONOMA AND WILLIAMS SONOMA HOME LAUNCH NEW AERIN COLLECTIONS
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 10, 2026--Aerin Lauder launches new AERIN collections for Williams Sonoma and Williams Sonoma Home
